summary: Use the ZAP API to control scans and collect results.
examples: Trigger an active scan from a build pipeline.
Retrieve alerts via the API for dashboards.
content:
## Overview
Use the ZAP API to control scans and collect results.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: API Access and Control (Workflow 24)
steps: Enable API access in Options if required.
Confirm host and port for API access.
Use API endpoints to trigger scans.
Secure the API with keys and allowed hosts.
Monitor API-driven activity in the UI.
